title: Tsiorchis wangii
parts: Tsiorchis wangii is a newly discovered plant species. However, there is limited information available about its medicinal properties and parts. The plant is endemic to the Himalayas and has been found to have potential in the field of medicine, but further research is needed to understand its full potential. If the plant does have medicinal properties, it is likely that the roots, leaves, or flowers would be used for medicinal purposes, but this information is not available. Further studies are required to determine the medicinal parts of Tsiorchis wangii.
